title: ABB India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: ABB India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Quality Control Engineer looking for your next big career move? ABB India in Surat offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About ABB India:
ABB India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ABB India!
